license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wgkfbuw
title: Cleaning up a biohazardous spill inside a centrifuge
author: Steven W Wilhelm

steps_raw.instruction: Close off the area and allow aerosols to settle.
Wait 00:30:00 to allow the aerosols to settle.
Don appropriate PPE: laboratory coat, safety glasses and Nitrile gloves.
Remove rotors and bucket and place in Biosafety Cabinet.
Thoroughly disinfect the inside and outside of the centrifuge rotor, cups and accessories and allow proper contact time. After disinfection, move to sink for a thorough rinse, dry thoroughly.
For the centrifuge interior, follow the steps above for cleaning up a spill outside a Biosafety Cabinet.
Segregate contaminated cleanup materials into the appropriate biohazardous waste containers.
